shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch sitting inside a Discord chat window as AI images generate around it, representing Midjourney's community-first launch.
assets.caption: Hatch sitting inside a Discord chat window as AI images generate around it, representing Midjourney's community-first launch.
assets.prompt: Midjourney's Discord Launch | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) sitting inside a stylized Discord chat window, surrounded by floating AI-generated images appearing in real time. Other small character figures visible reacting with emoji. Hatch looks delighted. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.
